title: Scaffold internal/parse package with types, grammar loading, and BashParser
description: Create internal/parse package with foundational types (ExtractedCommand, ParseResult, InlineScript, WarningCode), grammar loading (LangGrammar, SupportedLanguages, NewLangParser with sync.Pool), BashParser with sync.Pool parser pooling, Parse() with panic recovery and MaxInputSize guard, Tree wrapper. Import tree-sitter-go via go get github.com/dcosson/treesitter-go@v0.1.0 (public module, no local linking needed). Unit tests: grammar loading, BashParser simple/compound/malformed, size boundary, concurrent stress test with -race.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete for dcg-otc.1 and tests passing (including race). Commit: b96fa8e. Ready for review.

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Addressed review feedback in commit 0647186: ExtractedCommand 12-field contract aligned, ParseResult uses guard.Warning, panic recovery now discards parser on panic. Note: treesitter-go v0.1.0 does not expose ts.NewParser at root; parser construction uses github.com/dcosson/treesitter-go/parser.NewParser with root ts types imported elsewhere.
